auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.passwordMinLength12: Password must be at least 12 characters
auth.passwordRequireLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
auth.passwordRequireUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
auth.passwordRequireDigit: Password must contain at least one number
auth.passwordRequireSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character
auth.errors.accountLocked: Account is temporarily locked due to too many failed login attempts
auth.errors.passwordResetNotAvailableFor: Password reset is not available for OAuth accounts
auth.errors.failedToGenerateResetToken: Failed to generate password reset token
auth.errors.twoFactorNotSetup: Two-factor authentication is not set up
auth.landing.title: Welcome to TallyJ
auth.landing.description: TallyJ is a modern election management system specifically designed for Bahá’í communities. It provides a comprehensive platform for managing elections, people, ballots, and real-time results tallying.
auth.landing.optionOfficerDesc: Manage elections, people, and process ballots. For head tellers and election convenors.
auth.landing.optionVoterDesc: Cast your ballot using your email or phone number.
auth.landing.optionTellerDesc: Process ballots and assist in an election.
auth.landing.optionExternalDesc: Access the specialized system for officer elections.
auth.voterLogin.title: Voter
auth.voterLogin.emailSent: Verification code sent to your email
auth.tellerLogin.title: Assistant Teller
auth.tellerJoin.title: Join Election as Teller
auth.tellerJoin.description: Enter the election details to join as an assistant teller
auth.googleCallback.title: Completing Sign In
auth.voterAuth.title: Voter Authentication
auth.voterBallot.title: Cast Your Ballot
auth.voterConfirmation.title: Vote Confirmed
auth.landing.benefits.title: Modern Election Management for Bahá’í Communities
auth.landing.benefits.subtitle: A comprehensive platform designed to streamline your election process with real-time collaboration, secure voting, and transparent tallying.
auth.landing.features.realtime.title: Real-Time Collaboration
auth.landing.features.realtime.descripti: Multiple tellers can work simultaneously with live updates. See ballot processing status instantly across all devices.
auth.landing.features.secure.title: Secure & Reliable
auth.landing.features.secure.description: Built with enterprise-grade security. Your election data is encrypted, backed up, and protected with multi-factor authentication.
auth.landing.features.flexible.title: Flexible Voting Options
auth.landing.features.flexible.descripti: Support for in-person ballots, online voting, and delegate elections. Configure the process to match your community's needs.
auth.landing.features.transparent.title: Transparent Tallying
auth.landing.features.transparent.descri: Complete audit trail with detailed logs. Real-time results display and comprehensive reporting for accountability.
auth.landing.features.multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
auth.landing.features.multilingual.descr: Interface available in multiple languages to serve diverse Bahá’í communities worldwide.
auth.landing.features.accessible.title: Easy to Use
auth.landing.features.accessible.descrip: Intuitive interface designed for all technical skill levels. Guided workflows make election management straightforward.
auth.landing.cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
auth.landing.cta.description: Choose your role above to access the system and begin managing your election today.
